python -c 
import urllib.request

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

urls = [
    'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4795984/pdf/nihms766337.pdf',
    'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/pdf/nihms766337.pdf',
]

headers = {
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
}

for url in urls:
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            final_url = resp.url
            print(f'URL: {url}')
            print(f'Final URL: {final_url}')
            print(f'Content-Type: {ct}')
            print(f'Size: {len(data)} bytes')
            print(f'Starts with: {data[:8]}')
            if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
                with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print('SUCCESS: Saved PDF')
                break
            else:
                print('Not PDF, content snippet:', data[:300])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'URL: {url} -> Error: {e}')
